base: {"action_type":"retry_replan","branch_source":"latest","branch_source_round":1,"decision":"regenerate","diagnosis":"The image failed to show exactly four flamingos (count_mismatch) and failed to show the flamingos chasing the horse (relation_mismatch). Avoid any occlusion, merging, or extra objects.","repair_constraints":["Show exactly four pink flamingos, no more and no fewer.","Make the four flamingos separate, fully visible, non-overlapping, and easy to count as four distinct birds.","Depict all four flamingos chasing the horse: each flamingo is behind the horse, facing toward the horse, and moving in the horse's direction.","Show exactly one horse ahead of the flamingos and left of all chairs.","Show exactly four wooden chairs as a separate visible group to the right of the horse.","Do not include extra flamingos, horses, or chairs."],"retry_prompt":"A clear side-view scene with exactly four pink flamingos chasing exactly one horse. Add motion lines to show the flamingos chasing the horse. Place exactly four wooden chairs as a separate group on the right side, and keep the horse clearly to the left of all four chairs.
